titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Trumbull College, Yale University, Photographs
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.
This collection contains 14 published digital objects. And those objects are comprised of 30 digital files.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday February 1, 2024 at 08:34

did.abstract: The collection contains photographs and slides documenting the construction of Trumbull College at Yale, including interior and exterior views.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-B (YRG 46-B), Records and materials documenting individual Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Trumbull College, Yale University, Photographs (RU 609). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged in four series: I. Construction Progress Photographs, 1930-1933. II. General Views, 1930-1969. III. Oversize. IV. Slides and transparencies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection contains photographs and slides documenting the construction of Trumbull College at Yale, including interior and exterior views.

did.unittitle: Inscription above western gate on Elm Street
